name: Warmer Kartoffelsalat (Hot Potato Salad)
recipeInstructions:
1. Peel the potatoes and slice them paper thin.
2. Cook the bacon slowly in a frying pan, then drain on paper towels.
3. Saute the onion in bacon fat until golden brown.
4. In a separate bowl, mix together flour, sugar, salt, celery seeds, and pepper.
5. Gradually add the dry ingredients to boiling water and vinegar, stirring constantly.
6. Cook over low heat until smooth and bubbly.
7. Remove from heat, stir in the remaining water and vinegar, then boil for 1 minute.
8. Carefully stir in the potatoes and crumbled bacon bits.
9. Cover and let stand until ready to serve.
